_meta.description: Source credibility registry — external sites and internal source categories with base credibility scores
_meta.notes: base_credibility is the starting score (0-10) before post-level modifiers. Maps to authority_tier in ARCHITECTURE.md.

hyundai-shop-manual.label: Hyundai Factory Shop Manual (2003 Tiburon)
hyundai-shop-manual.notes: OCR-extracted to common/shop-manual/. Authoritative — no vetting needed.

hyundai-etm.label: Hyundai Electrical Troubleshooting Manual (2003 Tiburon)
hyundai-etm.notes: OCR-extracted to common/electrical-manual/. Authoritative — no vetting needed.

manufacturer-datasheets.label: Manufacturer Technical Datasheets
manufacturer-datasheets.notes: Factory docs from the device manufacturer. Equivalent to T1 for that specific device, T2 for GK Tiburon fitment context.

opengk.label: OpenGK Community Wiki
opengk.editorial_process: Peer-reviewed MediaWiki; maintainer spot-checks against T1 where possible
opengk.notes: High quality reverse-engineering and tuning data. Not factory-verified — spot-check against shop manual for any overlap.

newtiburon.label: NewTiburon Forum
newtiburon.notes: Base 3/10 for unvetted posts. Stickied guides get +2. Priority contributors get their individual weight. See scoring-algorithm.md for composite formula.

rockauto.label: RockAuto Parts Catalog
rockauto.notes: Good for part number cross-references. Fitment data is catalog-level, not installation-verified.

_template._comment: Copy this block and rename the key to add a new source
